home_hero_subtitle: Edge Tracker signs and anchors outputs from independent edge nodes on Solana, from sensor readings to local AI inferences. Cryptographic device identity, signed ingestion, Merkle-anchored datasets. No proprietary hardware, no trusted intermediaries.
home_featured_subtitle: Top verified sensors from our infrastructure
home_featured_error_hint: Make sure the Supabase Edge Function is deployed and running.
insedge_lead: Open-source tools we're building at the edge of AI and the physical world.
insedge_initiatives_subtitle: What we're working on, in the open.
edge_tracker_card_description: Infrastructure for independent edge AI nodes to share verifiable inferences. Each node signs its outputs at the source, peers verify without a coordinator, and results anchor to Solana. Runs on commodity microcontrollers, no proprietary hardware, no trusted middlemen.
home_features_title: Open Infrastructure for verifiable physical data
home_features_subtitle: Edge Tracker bridges IoT devices, decentralized networks, and open environmental intelligence systems
home_features_realtime_desc: Live sensor data with cryptographic verification at the device level
home_features_anchor_desc: Dataset integrity proofs anchored on Solana for immutable verification
home_features_storage_desc: No centralized cloud dependency—full data provenance and ownership
home_cta_subtitle: Connect your wallet and register your first sensor in minutes
public_sensors_subtitle: Real-time IoT sensor data verified on the Solana blockchain. Public datasets available for audit and acquisition.
public_sensors_empty_message: Public sensors will appear here once sensor owners mark their datasets as public.
public_sensors_empty_hint: Check back later or register your own sensor to contribute to the public collection.
public_sensors_info: All datasets are available for acquisition through data negotiation. Click any sensor to view its data feed and public datasets, or contact the sensor owner for access details.
sensor_mode_unverified_tooltip: Physical device registered but not yet minted as an NFT on Solana. Readings are stored and can be inspected, but identity attestation is deferred until the owner triggers the mint (ADR-014). Events without a valid signature carry the unsigned_dev wire marker and are not eligible for on-chain anchoring.
sensor_mode_nft_tooltip: This sensor is registered as an NFT on the Solana blockchain, ensuring verifiable ownership and provenance.
psd_no_live_data_msg: Waiting for the device to send readings.
psd_no_live_data_hint: Make sure the physical sensor is powered on and connected.
psd_no_datasets_msg: This sensor doesn't have any public datasets available for audit yet.
psd_showing_last_hour: Showing readings from the last 1 hour (default system range)
audit_not_anchored_msg: This dataset has not been anchored onchain yet. Click Anchor in the sensor's Datasets tab to submit the Merkle root as a memo transaction on Solana.
audit_filter_placeholder: Filter by timestamp, value or hash prefix...
audit_powered_suffix: — An open infrastructure for verifiable physical data
